trap_check: 真正意思：你搞砸了（不是吹气，是毁了机会/把事情办糟了）

examples.en: "You were up for partner and you blew it!"
examples.cn: 你都快要升合伙人了，结果你搞砸了！

examples.source: Good Will Hunting · 心灵捕手
examples.en: "This was your shot, and you blew it."
examples.cn: 这是你的机会，你把它毁了。

examples.source: The Social Network · 社交网络
examples.en: "You had one chance and you blew it."
examples.cn: 你只有一次机会，结果搞砸了。
